properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I saw the storm clouds gatherin', on the horizon line, Walked a thousand miles or more, in search of something Divine, Halfway down that twisted road, through the tears and rain, I felt Your hand upon my heart, easing all the pain.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Every winding detour, every wrong turn led me here, Through the valleys deep and wide, You were always near, You blessed this wayward path I trod, heard my silent prayers, Turned the darkness into light, with Your love and care.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Bless the wayward path I’ve roamed, winding through the night, Lead me to Your open arms, where everything’s made right, Every step and stumble, every tear I’ve cried, You blessed the wayward path, stayed always by my side.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When the nights were cold and long, I felt Your gentle grace, In the silence of my heart, You found a secret place, Showed me love I've never known, stronger than my fears, In the stillness of the dawn, I knew that You were here.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Through the trials and tribulations, through the highs and lows, In Your everlasting love, my heart forever knows, That every twist and turn, is leading me back home, On this wayward path You blessed, I know I’m not alone.
